description: AirBridge Pro is a native, high-performance, ultra-lightweight macOS desktop application written in Swift and SwiftUI.

A lightning-fast, 100% native macOS menu bar app launcher inspired by -DockPops.- It lives in your top menu bar and provides a beautiful, cascading -Liquid Glass- interface to quickly access your favorite apps, files, and folders.

A high-performance native macOS application written in Objective-C++ (C++17 and Cocoa) that pins interactive, glassmorphic web-based widgets directly to your desktop background wallpaper, functioning exactly like iOS homescreen widgets.
